name: Adidas AG
lede: Adidas runs two centers across two Indian cities. Chennai and Gurugram, covering GBS and GCC/GIC, built over ten years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Adidas office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Adidas AG GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Adidas runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Chennai, Gurugram), covering GBS and GCC/GIC. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

titles.title: Head of Talent Acquisition Tech | Digital | Analytics | GBS

about.description: Adidas's India footprint covers Chennai and Gurugram, spanning GBS and GCC/GIC. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, HR and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 49 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Adidas operate in India?
faq.a: Adidas operates 2 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Adidas have centers in?
faq.a: Adidas's India footprint includes Chennai and 1 additional city.

faq.q: What types of centers does Adidas run in India?
faq.a: Adidas runs GBS and 1 additional center type in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Adidas's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Adidas's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Adidas's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Adidas's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
